title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy:
Guardian Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
